response.justification: Bogdan is a capable senior engineer with demonstrated leadership and mentoring initiative through workshops and personal projects. His experience at Dunnhumby with low-latency, high-throughput systems using DLang is relevant. However, there is a significant mismatch with the core technical requirements. The role demands 8 years of C++ experience, whereas his resume shows less than one year of professional C++ work. His background is predominantly in web technologies (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js) and application-level development, rather than building the core cloud compute infrastructure this role focuses on.
strengths: Demonstrates strong leadership and mentoring initiative through founding projects, organizing workshops, and code dojos.
Experience with high-performance, low-latency systems handling millions of requests per second.
Broad technical background, showing versatility and the ability to learn and work with diverse technologies (web, mobile, backend, infra).
concerns: Vastly insufficient C++ experience (less than 1 year) compared to the 8-year minimum qualification.
Experience is primarily in application development using cloud services (AWS CDK) rather than building core cloud compute platforms.
Career focus has been on web technologies (JS/TS, Node.js) and DLang, not the C++ and large-scale systems required for this role.
